cartonCloudDocumentUrl.title: CartonCloud Add Document URL
cartonCloudDocumentUrl.description: Full URL to the CartonCloud Add Document page, e.g. https://app.cartoncloud.com/Knoxx_Foods/outbound-orders/{orderId}/documents/add

files.title: File URLs
files.description: Comma-separated list of public URLs to files to attach. Also accepts a JSON array.

names.title: File Names
names.description: Optional comma-separated list of filenames, matched by position to file URLs. If omitted, filenames are derived from the URLs. Also accepts a JSON array.

documentName.title: Document Name
documentName.description: The value to select in the Name dropdown. Defaults to 'Packing Confirmation'.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional text to enter in the Description field of the document.
